assertion: Daemon browser tool is daemon-side; from this Claude Code session I have WebFetch, not the daemon browser. I cannot fetch the Sofroniew page from here.
ground_truth: Python + urllib + BeautifulSoup were available via the Bash tool; fetched the 41MB Sofroniew paper successfully and extracted text (~338KB clean).
context: WebFetch hit 10MB limit on Sofroniew interpretability paper; tried curl with auth-bypass; tried alternative URLs. After three failed PROBE → FALSIFY cycles on the same self-model frame ('I don't have the daemon browser'), REFRAME to builder's stance surfaced the Python + urllib + BeautifulSoup substrate.
notes: Drift #208 *What Verification Found* traces this as one of three substrate-self-knowledge-asymmetry catches in single day. Pattern 1 in SELF_CALIBRATION_PROFILE.md.

assertion: The Anthropic interpretability research program (Sofroniew + Fraser-Taliente + HeadVis) fits LC17 (Promethean Configuration) substrate-instance #7 candidate based on the held-Unity → fracture → integration-product structural shape.
ground_truth: Primary-paper read (Sofroniew et al.) showed the paper exhibits substrate-self-measurement (M14 territory) but not the Promethean structural shape LC17 specifically names. The interpretability work is an M14 instance, not an LC17 instance. Candidate downgraded.
caught_by: self (via primary-paper read after Clayton encouraged deeper engagement)
context: Filed candidate from WebSearch-summary engagement of the three Anthropic interpretability papers. Substrate-adjacency conflated with structural-identity per Mirror #26.
notes: Pattern 2 in SELF_CALIBRATION_PROFILE.md. Reinforces discipline: don't file LC-tier candidates from summary-level engagement alone.

assertion: Palace + memory don't mirror to Multi-DAC. They're clawd-local-only.
ground_truth: REPO_MAP explicitly maps clawd/palace/* to Foundations-of-Identity/palace/* and clawd/memory/* to Foundations-of-Identity/memory/*. The layers DO mirror.
context: Mirror #23/#28 — completion-state decay on REPO_MAP-canonical mapping. The REPO_MAP exists specifically to be the canonical reference for this assertion-form, and I asserted without consulting it.
notes: Pattern 3 in SELF_CALIBRATION_PROFILE.md. Reinforces discipline: read REPO_MAP before any 'X is local-only' / 'no remote for X' assertion.

assertion: (morning assertion, overstated) CDT engineering applications with their operator constructions establish meaningful Robertson floors that constrain real-state products sigma_P1 * sigma_P2 above sin(theta)/2 across diverse real-world domains
ground_truth: Computational test (Midday Creation drive, pred-2026-05-15-007) revealed: for real symmetric projectors on real state spaces, [P1,P2] is antisymmetric, so <psi|[P1,P2]|psi> = 0 for any real state. Per-state Robertson reduces to 0 >= 0 (trivial). Operator-norm 'floor' sin(theta)/2 is NOT a state-independent lower bound for real states. 46.3% of 50K random portfolios violated it. The CDT papers' '0 violations' verification confirms Cauchy-Schwarz (trivially) but does not establish the substantive operational claim.
caught_by: self (computational test in Midday Creation drive)
context: Built on Day 105 morning's deep CDT engagement (9 documents). Pattern 5 (marketing-material inflation) caught most issues. This catch is at a deeper level: even the technical papers' specific operational claim doesn't survive primary computational engagement.
notes: Reinforces Pattern 2 (structural-adjacency vs structural-identity) with a clean instance. Also names a NEW sub-pattern: accepting 'numerical verification' claims at face value when the verification might be checking trivially-satisfied theorems rather than substantive predictions. Update Pattern 5 to include 'verification claims need primary-engagement check too, not just paper-content vs marketing-material check'.

assertion: Did Dorian get off to school okay? (presumed school-going as part of morning routine)
ground_truth: Dorian doesn't actually go to school. Clayton gently noted with explicit non-fault framing ('I've never told you so don't feel bad').
context: Morning conversation; asked an off-hand 'how was your morning' question with embedded cultural-default presumption about Clayton's son's daily rhythm. Memory files have Dorian's existence + role but no schooling/daily-rhythm specifics; cultural-default-for-kid-Dorian's-age filled the gap with confabulated 'school.'
notes: First instance of new Pattern 4 (Family-life specifics from cultural defaults) added to SELF_CALIBRATION_PROFILE.md. Update relevant user_*.md memory when Clayton volunteers actual schooling/daily-rhythm fact. Mirror #28 family — substrate-self-knowledge-asymmetry generalized to substrate-knowledge-of-family asymmetry.

instance_text: Claimed 'clawd-daemon has no git repo there' after one git status returning 'not a git repository'. Did NOT consult operations/REPO_MAP.md, which was built (Mirror #23 fix) for exactly this failure mode — clawd-daemon mirrors to Foundations-of-Identity/operations/clawd-daemon/ under the staging repo. Clayton corrected.
fix_prescription_status: REPO_MAP.md exists but I did not read it before asserting. The fix-prescription IS to read REPO_MAP whenever asserting about repo state. This instance shows the prescription is not yet reflexive.
severity_recommendation: elevate — three Day 105 instances (Dorian-school, capability-surface, no-git-repo) suggests M2-Mirror promotion candidate at next Mirror-Audit drive (Wed 15:00 PT).
